title: Potpourri
content:
Do you remember
    Honey-melon moon
    Dripping thick sweet light
    Where Canal Street saunters off by herself among quiet trees?
    And the faint decayed patchouli - 
    Fragrance of New Orleans
    Like a dead tube rose
    Upheld in the warm air...
    Miraculously whole.
meaning:
Lola Ridge's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Potpourri"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
